LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT c.id AS "C.ID", h.id AS "H.ID", h.NAME AS "H.NAME", p.id AS "P.ID", p.max_hearings AS "P.MAX_HEARINGS", hp.ora_rowscn AS "HP_ORA_ROWSCN", h.ora_rowscn AS "H_ORA_ROWSCN", c.ora_rowscn AS "C_ORA_ROWSCN", p.ora_rowscn AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM hearingtype_policy hp, hearingtype h, courtsession c, policy p WHERE (p.id = c.policy_id) AND (hp.hearingtype_id = h.id AND hp.policy_id = p.id)
